Incident: API outage due to Redis cache saturation (22 minutes)
Root Cause: Unbounded session objects and missing eviction policy
Lessons Learned: Capacity planning, enforce rate limits, instrument hot keys
Remediation: Enabled Redis eviction/TTL, autoscaling policies, adaptive rate limiting with WAF integration

Incident: SEPA return files rejected by partner (wrong pain.002 version)
Root Cause: Partner-specific schema mismatch and inadequate contract tests
Lessons Learned: Lock versions and validate against partner XSDs before release
Remediation: Schema version pinning, pre-prod certification gates, contract testing suite

Incident: KYC vendor outage causing onboarding backlog
Root Cause: Single vendor dependency during peak hours
Lessons Learned: Introduce circuit breakers and failover to secondary provider
Remediation: Async onboarding queue, circuit breaker, Onboardly as backup with health checks

Incident: FX pricing stale (0.4% undercharge over 31 txns)
Root Cause: Background FX refresh job failure and missing alerts
Lessons Learned: Critical job monitoring and sanity checks vs market mid
Remediation: Heartbeat monitors, quote freshness SLOs, deviation alerts

Incident: Credential stuffing attempt blocked by WAF
Root Cause: External attack surface and weak MFA adoption on customer side
Lessons Learned: Promote and enforce MFA; improve anomaly detection
Remediation: Mandatory MFA for dashboard, enhanced anomaly alerts, customer comms template

Incident: PII written to EU sandbox debug logs
Root Cause: Overly verbose logging and lack of redaction in legacy service
Lessons Learned: Data classification and logging standards; automated redaction
Remediation: Adopt redaction library, prohibit PII in logs, add CI checks for logging patterns
